title: Laxminarayan temple, Therubali
tagline: Laxminarayan temple, Therubali — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Laxminarayan temple is located at IMFA factory of Therubali, Rayagada district, Odisha.
overview.description: Laxminarayan temple is located at IMFA factory of Therubali, Rayagada district, Odisha. The deities Laxminarayan, Hanuman, Lord Jagannath, Balabhadra, Subhadra and Lord Siva are worshiped by thousands of devotees.

topPlaces.name: Therubali
topPlaces.description: Therubali is a village in Rayagada district in the Indian state of Odisha. IMFA's main plant is located at Therubali.

topPlaces.name: Therubali Airstrip
topPlaces.description: Therubali Airstrip is a private airport located 3.3 km from Therubali city center in Rayagada district, Odisha.The Airstrip is spread over 30 acres and is under the control of the Indian Metals and Ferro Alloys Ltd (IMFA).

topPlaces.name: Chandili
topPlaces.description: Chandili is a census town and a Notified Area Council in Rayagada district in the state of Odisha, India.

topPlaces.name: Hatipathar, Rayagada
topPlaces.description: Hatipathar is a natural tourist site located in the Rayagada district in the Indian state of Odisha. It lies approximately 3 kilometres from the town of Rayagada, on the banks of the Nagavali River.

topPlaces.name: Jaykaypur
topPlaces.description: Jaykaypur (also known as J.K Pur or Jaykaypur Township or JK Pur Township) is a small town on the bank of Nagavali River in the Rayagada district, Odisha, India. It came into existence due to the inception of JK Paper Mills in the early 1960s, which is now a publicly traded company.

items.note: Therubali is a village in Rayagada district in the Indian state of Odisha. IMFA's main plant is located at Therubali.

Therubali Airstrip is a private airport located 3.3 km from Therubali city center in Rayagada district, Odisha.The Airstrip is spread over 30 acres and is under the control of the Indian Metals and Ferro Alloys Ltd (IMFA).
Chandili is a census town and a Notified Area Council in Rayagada district in the state of Odisha, India.
Hatipathar is a natural tourist site located in the Rayagada district in the Indian state of Odisha. It lies approximately 3 kilometres from the town of Rayagada, on the banks of the Nagavali River.

Jaykaypur (also known as J.K Pur or Jaykaypur Township or JK Pur Township) is a small town on the bank of Nagavali River in the Rayagada district, Odisha, India. It came into existence due to the inception of JK Paper Mills in the early 1960s, which is now a publicly traded company.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Laxminarayan temple, Therubali?
faq.a: The best time to visit Laxminarayan temple, Therubali is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Laxminarayan temple, Therubali?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (180 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (178 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Laxminarayan temple, Therubali?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Laxminarayan temple, Therubali at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Laxminarayan temple, Therubali?
faq.a: Stays in Laxminarayan temple, Therubali start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Laxminarayan temple, Therubali?
faq.a: The top attractions are Therubali, Therubali Airstrip, Chandili, Hatipathar, Rayagada, Jaykaypur.
